name: The Data-Heist Server Rack
description: Decrypt the root directory using a firewall-to-trash compactor memory leak exploit.

flaws.name: Send Malformed Packet
flaws.flavor_text: Craft and send a highly malformed packet designed to fail firewall checks and get routed directly to the trash compactor buffer.

flaws.name: Trigger Trash Compactor
flaws.flavor_text: Force execution of the trash compactor on the bad packet. This triggers the memory leak, overriding permissions and decrypting the root directory.
